narrative:
Washington Twp township has 2,177 registered voters, with 47.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.5 percentage points.
